description.ru: Давно это было, — Сигурд-воитель юный Вельсунг у Гьюки гостил; клятвы он принял от братьев обоих верности клятвы от воинов смелых.
description.en: "Of old did Sigurth Gjuki seek, The Volsung young, in battles victor; Well he trusted the brothers twain, With mighty oaths among them sworn."

source.ru: Древнеисландский текст, ред. Guðni Jónsson. Текст на русском языке в переводе А. И. Корсуна
source.en:
An ancient Icelandic text, edited by Guðni Jónsson.
Translation by Henry Adams Bellows.

lines: nor dreamed she should bear it,
from the hand of the king."
In the blood of the friend
from the home of his foes;
To the Thing as the son
was the light of his eyes,
if my hand I gave not;
When he hears I have gone
of her sword had pierced it;
or the beams of the sun."
and the lives of his sons;)
